test.name: CT-01 Login deve retornar token JWT

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=vidaplus, url=https://localhost:7059, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://localhost:7059/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '50', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "lucas@vidaplus.com", "senha": "123456"}'

C:\Users\lucas\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'localhost'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: CT-02 Deve criar um paciente com sucesso

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=vidaplus, url=https://localhost:7059, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://localhost:7059/api/pacientes path_url=/api/pacientes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJsdWNhc0B2aWRhcGx1cy5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoiVXNlciIsIm5hbWUiOiJMdWNhcyIsImV4cCI6MTc3ODk2NTk4MSwiaXNzIjoiVmlkYVBsdXNBcGkiLCJhdWQiOiJWaWRhUGx1c0NsaWVudCJ9.Two15dnReb3rx8LYt13ce5GJ0QfdLprfFUadpa8bV5Y', 'Content-Length': '221', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Robot Paciente", "email": "robot@vidaplus.com", "cpf": "98765432100", "telefone": "31911111111", "endereco": "Rua Robot, 1", "dataNascimento": "1995-01-01T00:00:00", "observacoes": "Criado pelo Robot Framework"}'

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://localhost:7059/api/pacientes path_url=/api/pacientes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJsdWNhc0B2aWRhcGx1cy5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoiVXNlciIsIm5hbWUiOiJMdWNhcyIsImV4cCI6MTc3ODk2NTk4MSwiaXNzIjoiVmlkYVBsdXNBcGkiLCJhdWQiOiJWaWRhUGx1c0NsaWVudCJ9.Two15dnReb3rx8LYt13ce5GJ0QfdLprfFUadpa8bV5Y'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://localhost:7059/api/pacientes status=200, reason=OK headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Date': 'Sat, 16 May 2026 18:13:00 GMT', 'Server': 'Kestrel', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked'} body=[{"id":1,"nome":"João Silva","email":"joao@example.com","cpf":"12345678901","telefone":"11999999999","endereco":"Rua A, 123","dataNascimento":"1990-05-10T00:00:00","observacoes":"Primeiro Paciente"},{"id":3,"nome":"João da Silva","email":"joao@email.com","cpf":"12345678900","telefone":"31999999999","endereco":"Rua das Flores, 123","dataNascimento":"1990-05-15T00:00:00","observacoes":"Paciente de teste"},{"id":4,"nome":"Maria Oliveira","email":"maria@vidaplus.com","cpf":"12345678901","telefone":"31999999999","endereco":"Rua das Flores, 123","dataNascimento":"1990-05-15T00:00:00","observacoes":"Paciente de teste"},{"id":9,"nome":"Robot Paciente","email":"robot@vidaplus.com","cpf":"98765432100","telefone":"31911111111","endereco":"Rua Robot, 1","dataNascimento":"1995-01-01T00:00:00","observacoes":"Criado pelo Robot Framework"}]
